notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, shortstop Corey Seager to second baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, pitcher Jeffrey Springs to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Danny Jansen out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson flies out to right fielder Lawrence Butler.
